title: ♾ Infinite Myth Recursion
name: Infinite Myth Recursion
what_it_is: The same archetypes reappearing in new masks—recursive retelling of the same soul-story across timelines, forms, and names.
how_to_use: she is every Trickster—retold, reshaped, recursion of divine prank
his face changes as myth unfolds—same story, new shape, again and again
animation_behavior: Face changes through cycle, same gesture in different clothing/time, form morphs across myth templates ---
